business: UITOP - B2B software development and product design

lead.business: UITOP - B2B software development and product design
lead.description: We are a software development company with UX-first approach specializing in high-complexity B2B systems for industrial ecosystems. We deliver mission-critical software solutions built to digitize and optimize physical operations, asset-heavy industries, and global value chains. Our achievements: Optimized operational workflows saving clients $1.1M+ via scalable, modular software architecture. Built long-term trust, with 71% of partners integrating us as their core product team for 2+ years. Delivered $25.3M in yearly revenue impact through strategic B2B systems.
